---
title: "project01/README"
names:  Jacqueline Caldwell, Micheal Bambha
output: html_document
---

# Introduction
Project One:
Read in clinvar.vcf file; to identify AF_EXAC (allele frequencies) showing
rarity of the variant ; and create a list of associated clinical disease 
variants.

See project01.Rmd for more information, coding/testing was done with project01.py.
